en: The oracle that Habakkuk the prophet saw.
zh: 哈巴谷先知所得的默示。

en: O LORD, how long shall I cry for help, and you will not hear? Or cry to you "Violence!" and you will not save?
zh: 耶和華啊！ 我懇求，你不垂聽， 要到幾時呢？ 我向你呼叫“有狂暴的事”，你卻不拯救。

en: Why do you make me see iniquity, and why do you idly look at wrong? Destruction and violence are before me; strife and contention arise.
zh: 你為甚麼使我看見惡行？ 有奸惡的事，你為甚麼見而不理？ 毀滅和強暴在我面前， 紛爭和相鬥常常發生。

en: So the law is paralyzed, and justice never goes forth. For the wicked surround the righteous; so justice goes forth perverted.
zh: 因此律法不能生效 ， 公理無法彰顯。 因為惡人把義人包圍，所以公理顛倒。

en: "Look among the nations, and see; wonder and be astounded. For I am doing a work in your days that you would not believe if told.
zh: 你們當看列國，要定睛觀看，就會大大驚奇， 因為在你們的日子，我要作一件事， 即使有人說了出來，你們也不會相信。

en: For behold, I am raising up the Chaldeans, that bitter and hasty nation, who march through the breadth of the earth, to seize dwellings not their own.
zh: 就是要興起迦勒底人，那殘忍兇暴的民； 他們遍行全地，佔領別人的家園。

en: They are dreaded and fearsome; their justice and dignity go forth from themselves.
zh: 他們恐怖可怕，自以為義，趾高氣揚。

en: Their horses are swifter than leopards, more fierce than the evening wolves; their horsemen press proudly on. Their horsemen come from afar; they fly like an eagle swift to devour.
zh: 他們的馬比豹更快，比晚上的豺狼更猛。 他們的騎兵奔馳，自遠而來； 他們如鷹飛翔，迅速吞噬。

en: They all come for violence, all their faces forward. They gather captives like sand.
zh: 他們定著臉面向前，齊來行暴， 擄獲戰俘多如塵沙。

en: At kings they scoff, and at rulers they laugh. They laugh at every fortress, for they pile up earth and take it.
zh: 他們戲弄君王，以掌權的為笑柄； 他們嗤笑一切城堡，築壘攻取；

en: Then they sweep by like the wind and go on, guilty men, whose own might is their god!"
zh: 然後掃蕩如風吹過。 他們是有罪的，因他們以自己的勢力為神。

en: Are you not from everlasting, O LORD my God, my Holy One? We shall not die. O LORD, you have ordained them as a judgment, and you, O Rock, have established them for reproof.
zh: 耶和華我的 神，我的聖者啊！ 你不是自古就有的嗎？我們不會死的。 耶和華啊！你派他們行審判。 磐石啊！你立他們施懲罰。

en: You who are of purer eyes than to see evil and cannot look at wrong, why do you idly look at traitors and are silent when the wicked swallows up the man more righteous than he?
zh: 你的眼目純潔，不看邪惡， 不能坐視奸惡； 為甚麼見行詭詐的人而不理？ 惡人吞滅比自己公義的人，你為甚麼緘默呢？

en: You make mankind like the fish of the sea, like crawling things that have no ruler.
zh: 你竟使人像海裡的魚， 像無人管轄的爬行的動物。

en: He brings all of them up with a hook; he drags them out with his net; he gathers them in his dragnet; so he rejoices and is glad.
zh: 迦勒底人既用鈎把他們釣起來，用網拖走， 用魚網收聚在一處，就歡喜快樂，

en: Therefore he sacrifices to his net and makes offerings to his dragnet; for by them he lives in luxury, and his food is rich.
zh: 向自己的網獻祭，對魚網燒香， 因他們藉此收穫豐富，飲食充裕。

en: Is he then to keep on emptying his net and mercilessly killing nations forever?
zh: 這樣，他們倒空自己的網， 毫不留情地繼續殺戮列國。
